The '''''Taxon''-class probe ship''' was a utility [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Judicial Forces/Legends|Judicial Forces]] around [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]]. The ship was one of four that made up [[Raith Sienar/Legends|Raith Sienar's]] expeditionary naval squadron which went to [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] to aqcuire Zekotan ship-technology.<ref name="Rogue Planet">''[[Rogue Planet]]''</ref>
